calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Appellant Patricia Ann Toy appeared.
Defendant/Respondent RUI California LLC dba Hotel RIU Plaza Fisherman's Wharf appeared represented by Janell Alberto, Esq.
Javier Huerta, hotel manager, appeared.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

The Court dismissess the appeal for lack of jurisdiction pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 116.710(a).
No exhibits retained.
Judge: Andrew Y S Cheng; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (613)
